label: battery_current
note: External meter confirmed this is battery/output current; PV current is derived.

label: pv_amps
note: Estimated as battery volts * battery amps * 1.0526 / PV volts.

label: pv_watts
note: Estimated as PV volts * estimated PV amps.

label: charge_state_raw
note: Observed different values between idle and charging.

label: battery_soc_candidate
note: Behaves like state of charge percent.

label: charge_active_flag
note: Observed different values between idle and charging.

label: total_energy_kwh
note: Needs captures separated by days or enough production.

label: daily_energy_wh_candidate
note: Did not track the display daily energy value.

label: total_energy_kwh_candidate
note: Did not track the display total energy value.
